case_title: THE HERTZ CORPORATION vs. PEREZ, DAVID

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-26-1997 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212
NOTICE OF ARBITRATION HEARING SET FOR 9/4/97.
KEVIN V. RYAN, JUDGE; G.ESPINOCILLA,CLERK; D.COSTELLO,CSR. 10:51 AM COURT CALLS CAUSE FOR TRIAL. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES. CASE SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, DAVID ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $2,306.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,306.00
